title: spike~
description: report zero to non-0 transition intervals

messages.description: restarts the countdown of the refractory period
set refractory period, the maximal reporting rate
interval in ms since last 0 to non-0 transition

body: [spike~] reports intervals of zero to non-0 transitions from the signal input. The refractory period is set at the second inlet, which defines how soon after detecting a transition the spike~ object will report the next instance.
